query:
ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stripeCustomerId VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stripeSubscriptionId VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS subscriptionTier VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'free',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS subscriptionStatus VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'active',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS subscriptionCurrentPeriodEnd TIMESTAMP NULL;
